reason: Verified that the QA-20260708-024602-l5b1 agent responds correctly to a simple math question with the expected answer.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Gamut app homepage showing the agent list with two agents.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260708-024602-l5b1" agent in the sidebar — Successfully navigated to the agent's page with URL /agents/qa-20260708-024602-l5b1-y4oprbhnqp.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status was "idle", which is an acceptable status. Status was visible in the top right of the agent page.
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message was successfully entered and visible in the input field (ref=e172).

Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent successfully, and the page navigated to a new session view with URL /agents/qa-20260708-024602-l5b1-y4oprbhnqp/sessions/644701a0-76e6-4ce6-a3da-7109b05967a9. The session was automatically named "Math Question Session".
Waited for agent response (up to 3 minutes) — Response was received in approximately 1 second. Agent status changed from "idle" to "working" and then back after completion.

Verified response mentions "4" — The agent's response clearly displays "4", which is the correct answer to "2+2?". The response also shows "Worked for 1s" indicating the processing time. Response was visible in the chat view alongside the user's message.
